For non-trivial changes, please open an issue first to discuss the design.

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what this PR does and why. -->

## Linked issue(s)

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123 / Relates to #456 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / chore / CI

## How was this tested?

<!--
Describe what you ran:
- new / updated tests (unit, integration, cassettes)
- manual scenarios (docker compose up, asked X, observed Y)
- benchmarks (for performance PRs)
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style — `uv run ruff check .`, `uv run ruff format .`, `uv run mypy ...` pass locally.
- [ ] Tests added / updated and pass locally (`uv run pytest`).
- [ ] Documentation under `docs/` updated (if behaviour or public API changed).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-visible changes).
- [ ] No secrets, real credentials, or PII committed (including inside test fixtures and VCR cassettes).
- [ ] For breaking changes — migration notes added to docs and called out below.

## Breaking changes / migration notes

<!-- If the PR is not breaking, write "n/a". -->
